message:
fix(widget): enable keyboard navigation + fix zoom state bugs

- Enable captureKeys on /web_react page so keyboard shortcuts work
  (number keys, Tab, arrow keys for screen navigation)
- Fix imperative setZoom() to trigger container refit via applyZoomRef,
  so programmatic zoom changes properly recalculate cols/rows
- Fix applyZoom() to read from userZoomRef.current instead of stale
  closure variable, preventing zoom state desync
- Fix ResizeObserver to preserve zoom percentage in status text after
  container resize events
- Clean up applyZoomRef on destroy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
